allow: PowerShell(robocopy D:\\pgc_tmp D:\\PGC /E /MOVE /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS /NP; Write-Output "ExitCode: $LASTEXITCODE"; Write-Output "=== Result ==="; Get-ChildItem -Force D:\\PGC | Select-Object Name | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest http://127.0.0.1:8000/login -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "LEN: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; Write-Output $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(600,$r.Content.Length\)\) } catch { Write-Output "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if\($_.Exception.Response\){ $s=$_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $sr=New-Object IO.StreamReader\($s\); Write-Output $sr.ReadToEnd\(\).Substring\(0,800\) } })
